Class MultitenancyOptions

Top-level configuration options for the multi-tenancy library. Configure via the AddMultitenancy(options => ...) builder.

Inheritance
object

Syntax
public class MultitenancyOptions

Properties

| Edit this page View Source

IsolationStrategy

Gets or sets the database isolation strategy. Default: RowLevel.

Declaration
public IsolationStrategy IsolationStrategy { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
IsolationStrategy
| Edit this page View Source

RequireTenant

When true, a request with no resolvable tenant returns HTTP 404. When false, the request proceeds with HasTenant == false. Default: false.

Declaration
public bool RequireTenant { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool
| Edit this page View Source

TenantNotFoundStatusCode

HTTP status code returned when tenant resolution fails and RequireTenant is true. Default: 404.

Declaration
public int TenantNotFoundStatusCode { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int
| Edit this page View Source

TenantStore

Gets or sets where tenant records are persisted. Default: InMemory.

Declaration
public TenantStore TenantStore { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
TenantStore
